title: mentha × dumetorum var. hirta
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. hirta, also known as hairy wild mint, is a variety of wild mint that is a hybrid of Mentha dumetorum and another mint species, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mentha × dumetorum var. hirta include relief from nausea, headaches, and stress, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
